description: ICE graphic. The background is a photograph of a commercial restaurant kitchen where two workers in pale-blue caps, white t-shirts, aprons, and food-prep gloves cook at a stainless-steel range; the foreground worker (a woman) tends a frying pan among steaming pots, with a second worker behind her. Over the dark left side of the image is large distressed stencil typography: 'IT'S TIME TO' in white, then 'GET RIGHT' and 'WITH THE' and a very large 'LAW' in bold yellow weathered lettering. Bottom-left in white reads the URL 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'. Bottom-right shows the gray DHS Department of Homeland Security seal above the white 'ICE' wordmark.
notable_text: 'IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW'; 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'; 'ICE'
